English: Defeat these monsters to gain a permanent damage bonus against them.
Traditional_Chinese: 擊殺這些怪物以獲得對它們的永久傷害加成。

English: Jump a certain number of times.
Play for a certain number of hours to earn rewards.
Traditional_Chinese: 達到一定的遊戲時數 (小時) 即可得到獎勵。

English: Reach a certain level to earn rewards.
Traditional_Chinese: 達到指定等級即可得到獎勵。
吃下 30,000 顆金閃閃藥丸
吃下 200,000 個冰淇淋蛋糕
吃掉 50,000 顆珊瑚島咖哩。

English: Unlock rewards at 10, 20, 30, and 40 minutes of playtime. Resets daily at midnight.
Traditional_Chinese: 線上時間長達 10 分鐘、20 分鐘、30 分鐘和 40 分鐘時，即可解鎖獎勵，每日午夜重置。

English: Log in on consecutive days to unlock increasing daily rewards. Missing a day resets the streak. Resets at midnight.
Traditional_Chinese: 連續登入即可解鎖更多的每日獎勵，錯過一天將重置連續登入紀錄，每日午夜重置。

English: Unlock a reward for each day you log in.
Traditional_Chinese: 每天登入即可解鎖獎勵。

English: A unique reward for players who participated in the FlyForFun.io Alpha Test in 2019!
Traditional_Chinese: 為參與 2019 年 FlyForFun.io Alpha 測試的玩家提供的獨特獎勵！

English: A unique reward for players who reached level 40 in Flyff Project M!
Traditional_Chinese: Flyff Project M 中達到 40 級的玩家將獲得一份獨特的獎勵！

English: A unique reward for the player who created Flyffipedia. Thanks Swaight!
Traditional_Chinese: 這是對建立 Flyffipedia 的玩家的專屬獎勵。謝謝 Swaight！

English: A unique reward for players who help translate the game.
Traditional_Chinese: 為幫助翻譯遊戲的玩家提供的獨特獎勵。
完成最後一個大師任務。

English: Reach level 16 in the 2023 Flyff World Championship.
Traditional_Chinese: 在 2023 年 Flyff 世界錦標賽中達到 16 級。

English: Reach level 120 in the 2023 Flyff World Championship.
Traditional_Chinese: 在 2023 年 Flyff 世界錦標賽中達到 120 級。

English: Get second place in the 2023 Flyff World Championship PvP Competition.
Traditional_Chinese: 在 2023 年 Flyff 世界錦標賽 PvP 比賽中獲得第二名。

English: Get third place in the 2023 Flyff World Championship PvP Competition.
Traditional_Chinese: 在 2023 年 Flyff 世界錦標賽 PvP 比賽中獲得第三名。

English: Win the 2023 Flyff World Championship PvP Competition.
Traditional_Chinese: 贏得 2023 年 Flyff 世界錦標賽 PvP 比賽。

English: Get third place in the 2023 Flyff World Championship PvE Competition.
Traditional_Chinese: 在 2023 年 Flyff 世界錦標賽 PvE 比賽中獲得第三名。

English: You haven't logged in for a long time! Log in every day to receive rewards! Welcome back!
Traditional_Chinese: 您很久沒有登入了！每天登入即可領取獎勵！歡迎回來！

English: A unique reward for those who win the Rainbow Race.
Traditional_Chinese: 彩虹競賽的獲勝者將獲得獨特的獎勵。

English: Unique rewards based on the number of Rainbow Race wins!
Traditional_Chinese: 根據彩虹競賽的獲勝次數獲得獨特的獎勵！

English: Use a Bonus Playtime Coupon (purchasable with fCoins) to unlock bonus rewards at each daily playtime milestone.
Traditional_Chinese: 使用 fCoin 賺取額外的出席獎勵。

English: Use a Bonus Login Coupon (purchasable with fCoins) to unlock bonus rewards for each day you log in. After completion, you can use another coupon to start over.
Traditional_Chinese: 使用登入優惠券 (可使用 fCoins 購買) 即可解鎖每日登入獎勵。獎勵完成後，您可以使用另一張優惠券重新開始。

English: Reach level 60 in the 2024 Flyff World Championship.
Traditional_Chinese: 在 2024 年 Flyff 世界錦標賽中達到 60 級。

English: Find a partner and form a couple.

Traditional_Chinese: 保持戀愛關係一定天數。

English: Achieve a great success with a lifestyle skill.
Traditional_Chinese: 為生活技能取得巨大成功。
提升你的生活風格掌控力。
提升你的草藥採集熟練度。
提升你的煉金術熟練度
2024 年 FWC 競技場冠軍

送給所有飛行者的聖誕禮物

English: An honorable title awarded to the player who earned the most Champion Coins across all servers.
Traditional_Chinese: 頒發給全伺服器中獲得最多冠軍幣玩家的榮譽稱號。

Traditional_Chinese: 頒發給全伺服器中差一點就獲得最多冠軍幣玩家的榮譽稱號。
